title: Possible meaning of O nine system
display_title: Possible meaning of O nine system
wikitext:
[]: Possible meaning of "O-nine system"?             Quote Post by StevieC » Mon May 05, 2008 8:00 am When Ritsuko said "as in oni, a Japanese devil" I thought maybe there's not supposed to be a dash. Maybe it's not "O-9" but "onine" sort of like the noun canid and the adjective canine. Just a possibility. Any thoughts?

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon May 05, 2008 8:16 am I was under the impression that O-9 referred to the chances of success (1 x 10^-9)

[]:             Quote Post by majlund » Mon May 05, 2008 8:22 am Me too - and Ritsuko just couldn't resist to make a pun.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 05, 2008 9:23 am The "oni" comment is dub-only. ONAIN, the Japanese pronunciation of O-9, actually lends itself more to puns about masturbation IMHO.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon May 05, 2008 11:54 am how so?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon May 05, 2008 11:55 am Because it sounds like word for masturbation? D'oh :p

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 05, 2008 1:30 pm The Japanese usually refer to masturbation as "onanī" (from the German "Onanie"). I can just see the O-9 System getting deconstructed into Onanie System in some H-doujin parody. (Sort of like how "A.T. Field" got transformed into "Ecchi Field" in the first short from Paradise Lost 1 .)

[]:             Quote Post by majlund » Mon May 05, 2008 3:33 pm Reichu wrote: The Japanese usually refer to masturbation as "onanī" (from the German "Onanie").

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon May 05, 2008 3:45 pm majlund wrote: Hmm... In Danish it's "onani"

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon May 05, 2008 4:17 pm Mr. Tines wrote: sufficient misreading to have the amusing incident with a table in Code Geass episode 12 to be referred to as "角オナニー" (kado-onanii)

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Mon May 05, 2008 4:59 pm I have to dial oh-nine to get a landline out of my jobs phone network...I wonder if that's significant. Okay, so it's a devil of a system to use when it wants to be but still...

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon May 05, 2008 8:12 pm "Onain" has nothing to do with "Onan". In German, "Oh, Nein!" is "Oh, no!". Ritsuko's calling it the "Oh, no!" system because it simply refuses to work.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 05, 2008 8:35 pm Well, that could be a potential pun, yes. Did you read the thread, Ursus? No one claimed that O-9 had anything to do with "Onan".

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon May 05, 2008 9:26 pm UrsusArctos wrote: "Onain" has nothing to do with "Onan". In German, "Oh, Nein!" is "Oh, no!". Ritsuko's calling it the "Oh, no!" system because it simply refuses to work.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon May 05, 2008 9:28 pm Reichu wrote: Did you read the thread, Ursus? No one claimed that O-9 had anything to do with "Onan".

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 05, 2008 10:04 pm V wrote: That's really stretching it. The "Oni" explanation seemed to make sense.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon May 05, 2008 10:18 pm Reichu wrote: Onanie is about wanking.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 05, 2008 11:28 pm If we were discussing hermaphrodites, it would be in error to say we were talking about Hermes and Aphrodite. Etc.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue May 06, 2008 2:49 am Point taken. Also, lulz @ headdesk emoticon.

Maybe it's not "O-9" but "onine" sort of like the noun canid and the adjective canine. Just a possibility. Any thoughts?
